content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/logging-view-plugin/source/web/src/components/filters/attribute-filter.css

Apply ALL of the following 7 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 1
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-select' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-c-select' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper

Code context:
```
    1  .lv-plugin__attribute-filter .pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper {
    2    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    3  }

```

### Fix 2
Line: 1
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-select__toggle' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-c-select__toggle' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper

Code context:
```
    1  .lv-plugin__attribute-filter .pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper {
    2    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    3  }

```

### Fix 3
Line: 1
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle-wrapper]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-c-select__toggle-wrapper' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper

Code context:
```
    1  .lv-plugin__attribute-filter .pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper {
    2    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    3  }

```

### Fix 4
Line: 1
Rule [sd-css-removed-select]:
This CSS references the 'pf-c-select' component class which was removed in PatternFly v6.

The Select component was rebuilt and no longer uses this CSS class. This CSS override is dead and should be removed.

Check if the behavior you were overriding is now available via a component prop instead.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper

Code context:
```
    1  .lv-plugin__attribute-filter .pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper {
    2    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    3  }

```

### Fix 5
Line: 1
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-c-select]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-select' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-c-select' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper

Code context:
```
    1  .lv-plugin__attribute-filter .pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper {
    2    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    3  }

```

### Fix 6
Line: 1
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-select__toggle' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-c-select__toggle' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper

Code context:
```
    1  .lv-plugin__attribute-filter .pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper {
    2    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    3  }

```

### Fix 7
Line: 1
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle-wrapper]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-c-select__toggle-wrapper' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper

Code context:
```
    1  .lv-plugin__attribute-filter .pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper {
    2    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    3  }

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/logging-view-plugin/source/web/src/components/filters/attribute-filter.css
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
Let me read the file first.

Now let me reason through all 7 fixes:

**All 7 fixes target the same thing**: the CSS rule block on lines 1-3 that references `.pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper`. Every fix tells us that:
- `pf-v5-c-select` was removed (no v6 equivalent)
- `pf-v5-c-select__toggle` was removed (no v6 equivalent)  
- `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper` was removed (no v6 equivalent)
- The Select component was completely rebuilt in PF v6

The consistent guidance across all 7 fixes is: **remove this CSS rule entirely** since the class `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper` no longer exists in PatternFly v6 and has no replacement. The rule is dead CSS.

The second rule block (lines 5-7) targeting `.lv-plugin__attribute-filter__text` is a custom plugin class unrelated to PatternFly and should be preserved.

Let me also check if this CSS file is imported anywhere to see if there are downstream effects:

The CSS file is imported from `attribute-filter.tsx`. The remaining rule (`.lv-plugin__attribute-filter__text`) is a custom class that's still valid, so the import should stay. Let me now write the updated file with the dead PF rule block removed:

The file looks correct. The dead PatternFly rule block was removed and the remaining custom CSS rule is preserved.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select` | ✅ Applied | Removed the entire `.pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper` rule block (lines 1-3) — the `pf-v5-c-select` class was removed in PF v6 with no equivalent. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — `pf-v5-c-select__toggle` no longer exists. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle-wrapper` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper` no longer exists. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-css-removed-select` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — the Select component was completely rebuilt in PF v6 and this CSS override is dead. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — no valid `pf-v6-c-select` class exists. |
| Fix 6 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — no valid `pf-v6-c-select__toggle` class exists. |
| Fix 7 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle-wrapper` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — no valid `pf-v6-c-select__toggle-wrapper` class exists. |

All 7 fixes targeted the same CSS rule block on line 1 (`.lv-plugin__attribute-filter .pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper { flex-wrap: nowrap; }`). The entire block was removed as dead CSS. The remaining custom rule (`.lv-plugin__attribute-filter__text`) and the CSS import in `attribute-filter.tsx` are preserved since they remain valid.

chunks.response:
The file looks correct. The dead PatternFly rule block was removed and the remaining custom CSS rule is preserved.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select` | ✅ Applied | Removed the entire `.pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper` rule block (lines 1-3) — the `pf-v5-c-select` class was removed in PF v6 with no equivalent. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — `pf-v5-c-select__toggle` no longer exists. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-toggle-wrapper` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — `pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper` no longer exists. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-css-removed-select` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — the Select component was completely rebuilt in PF v6 and this CSS override is dead. |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — no valid `pf-v6-c-select` class exists. |
| Fix 6 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — no valid `pf-v6-c-select__toggle` class exists. |
| Fix 7 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-toggle-wrapper` | ✅ Applied | Same rule block removal — no valid `pf-v6-c-select__toggle-wrapper` class exists. |

All 7 fixes targeted the same CSS rule block on line 1 (`.lv-plugin__attribute-filter .pf-v5-c-select__toggle-wrapper { flex-wrap: nowrap; }`). The entire block was removed as dead CSS. The remaining custom rule (`.lv-plugin__attribute-filter__text`) and the CSS import in `attribute-filter.tsx` are preserved since they remain valid.
